home.sous_titre: A modern celebration of Algerian culinary heritage.
home.saveurs_texte: A bold reinvention of Mediterranean and Saharan classics. Every ingredient is selected with absolute rigour, paying tribute to Algeria's forgotten terroirs.
home.statement_texte: Let yourself be transported by a unique sensory experience at the heart of modern Algiers. Limited seats.
home.resa_texte: No deposit, no online payment. Payment on site only.

menu.citation: Algerian cuisine is not just a recipe — it is a memory to be savoured.
